new_classes.definition_en: Non-sparkling (still) fermented beverage other than wine, beer, and other fermented beverages covered by separate subheadings; includes the products described in HS Explanatory Note to heading 2206, second paragraph, (1) to (10), classified under CN subheading 2206 00 39.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the two main discriminating criteria derivable from the legal text for CN 22060039: (1) membership in the FermentedBeverage class (heading 2206), and (2) non-sparkling (still) character, distinguishing this subheading from the sibling sparkling subheading 22060031 (eucn:SparklingFermentedBeverage). The hasValue on codeString pins the node to the exact CN code. Coverage is not 1.0 because the legal text cross-references the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2206, second paragraph, items (1)–(10) — a detailed enumeration of specific product types (e.g. cider, perry, mead, sake, rice wine, etc.) — which cannot be fully expressed without introducing further sub-classes or enumeration axioms for each of those ten product types. That additional granularity is not yet present in the TBox and would require separate modelling decisions.
